name: Hearty Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the onion, celery, and carrot. Cook until the vegetables are softened.
4. Stir in the flour and cook for 2-3 minutes, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
5. Add the tomatoes, rice, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
6. Gradually add the milk while stirring continuously to prevent curdling.
7. Cook over low heat until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
8. Stir in the butter and season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
9. Serve hot.
